  Protagonist of SMT 1. 
  ...In process of writing
[END]

  ...In process of writing
[END]
1060: [Color:0xc]Summary[Color:0x0]
Sometimes cooperates with those who
pursue the middle path, though he is
a neutral party himself. It is evident
that Stephen is not a normal human,
since he is able to travel in the Expanse,
the Diamond Realm, and even dreams.
Current speculation is that Stephen is
a being from a higher dimension. This is
supported by his ability to influence
parallel universes. His real name is 
unknown−−”Stephen” is said to be an 
assumed name. Though he is always seen
in a wheelchair, it is believed his
legs are still functional.
[Color:0xc]Age/Sex[Color:0x0]
  Unknown/Male
[Color:0xc]Activity[Color:0x0]
Stephen created the Demon Summoming
Program in 201X, distributing it
indiscriminately throughout the Internet
as a means to combat the increasing
number of demons appearing across the
world. After God's Plan, he accompanied
the weakened Goddess of Tokyo and visited
Tokyo's would−be messiah, advising them
to follow the middle path. Only the
Goddess of Tokyo seems to be responsible
for awakening the messiahs, though details
are scarce. Similarly, it is unclear why
Stephen assisted the Goddess.

  [Color:0x5]This entry may have been written
by a biased party.[Color:0x0]
  [Color:0x5]*More Data Needed[Color:0x0]
[END]
